title: Friends Chat App

requirements.text: Create a backend actor that stores chat messages with a sender name, message text, and timestamp. Provide functions to post a new message and retrieve all messages in chronological order.

quotes: Create a app for me in my friends to chat with

acceptanceCriteria: Messages are persisted in stable storage across upgrades
postMessage(sender: Text, text: Text) appends a new message with a timestamp
getMessages() returns all messages sorted oldest-first

requirements.text: Build a chat UI that displays a scrollable feed of messages showing the sender name, message text, and time sent. Include a text input and a send button at the bottom to submit new messages. The user must enter a display name before chatting.

quotes: Create a app for me in my friends to chat with

acceptanceCriteria: New users are prompted to set a display name before they can send messages
All messages from all users are shown in the feed
New messages submitted via the input appear in the feed without a full page reload
The message feed auto-scrolls to the latest message
Pressing Enter or clicking Send submits the message

requirements.text: Apply a warm, modern visual theme with a bold color palette (e.g., coral/amber tones), clean card-based layout, rounded chat bubbles, and friendly sans-serif typography. The design should feel social, approachable, and consistent throughout the app.
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette is consistent across all views
Chat bubbles are visually distinct between the local user and others
Typography and spacing feel comfortable and readable
The layout is responsive and usable on both desktop and mobile screens

constraints: Real-time WebSocket-based updates are not supported; use polling via React Query to refresh messages periodically
nonGoals: User authentication or login via Internet Identity
File or image sharing in chat

required: Friendly chat app logo mark — two overlapping speech bubbles in warm coral and amber tones (chat-logo.dim_256x256.png)
